chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-647 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on MA No.2679/2026. 2. For order on office objection. 3. For order on MA No.2680/2026. 4. For hearing of main case. 14.04.2026 Petitioner Zulfiqar Ali Shah in person. 1. Urgency granted. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 2&4. The petitioner, who claims to be acting in the public interest, prays for a direction to the Federal Government to transfer the affairs of Rangers to the Sindh Government. When confronted with the relevant statutes, the petitioner has no answer. Therefore, petition is dismissed being misconceived. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
